name: Company Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the low-fat cheddar cheese into cubes if using a food processor.
2. Process until finely chopped.
3. Add ricotta cheese and process for about 10 seconds.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (except milk) and process until all are finely chopped.
5. Gradually add milk as needed to reach the desired consistency.
6. Serve with crackers or crisp vegetable sticks.
Nutritional Information:
Each serving contains about: Calories 79.3, Fat 5.61g, Sodium 58.0mg, Cholesterol 10.4mg, Protein 3.58g, Carbohydrates 4.71g, Fiber 1.10g.
